title: Iron Man
why_this_song: Iron Man by Black Sabbath (1970) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 3 times; first heard in: "(I am Iron Man)"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Nobody wants him"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "When he traveled time"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Nobody wants him"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Planning his vengeance"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "iron" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "iron" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "nobody" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "nobody" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: For Iron Man to spread fear

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: He just stares at the world

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Iron Man" was released in 1970. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Iron Man" foi lançada em 1970. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Iron Man" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Iron Man" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
